sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Ammonius</hi> Philosophus [Ammon.] <date TEIform="date">v. A.D.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">in APr. = in Aristotelis Analyticorum Priorum librum I com- mentarium,</title_> ed. M. Wallies (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> iv <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> vi), Berlin 1899. <title_ TEIform="title">in Cat. = in Aristotelis Categorias commentarius,</title_> ed. A. Busse (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> iv <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> iv), Berlin 1895. <title_ TEIform="title">in Int. = in Aristotelis de Interpretatione commentarius,</title_> ed. A. Busse (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> iv <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> v), Berlin 1897. <title_ TEIform="title">in Porph. = in Porphyrii Isagogen sive V voces,</title_> ed. A. Busse (<title_ TEIform="title">Comm. in Arist. Graeca</title_> iv <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> iii), Berlin 1891.</item>
